title: Nia and the Magic Garden Friends
synopsis: Nia discovers a magical garden where she makes new friends and learns about caring for nature together.

pages.text: Nia loved to explore. She had long braids with colorful beads that clicked when she walked. Today, she found a special gate covered in pretty flowers.

illustration.description: A little girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing before a flower-covered garden gate in bright sunlight with primary colors and white space around
illustration.alt: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes at a garden gate

pages.text: Behind the gate was the most beautiful garden Nia had ever seen! Butterflies danced around tall sunflowers. Bees buzzed happily from flower to flower.

illustration.description: A magical garden scene with Nia who has long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes walking among bright sunflowers, colorful butterflies, and busy bees in a joyful energetic style with primary colors
illustration.alt: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes in a magical garden

pages.text: A little rabbit hopped up to Nia. 'Hello!' said the rabbit. 'I'm Ruby. Will you be my friend?' Nia clapped her hands with joy. 'Yes! I'm Nia!'

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes sitting on grass talking to a friendly white rabbit, surrounded by flowers in bright sunny colors with white space
illustration.alt: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes meeting Ruby the rabbit

pages.text: Ruby showed Nia around the garden. They met Benny the butterfly and Sam the squirrel. All the animals loved playing together in the sunshine.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes playing with diverse animal friends including a butterfly, rabbit, and squirrel in a bright sunny garden with primary colors and joyful energy
illustration.alt: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes playing with garden animal friends

pages.text: The flowers looked thirsty. 'Let's help them!' said Nia. All the friends worked together. Nia carried water while Ruby and Sam planted new seeds.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes carrying a watering can, helping animal friends tend to flowers in an inclusive friendship scene with bright primary colors
illustration.alt: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes watering flowers with friends

pages.text: When they finished, the garden sparkled even more! 'Thank you for being such good friends,' said all the flowers. Nia smiled. She loved her new garden friends.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes surrounded by happy animal friends and blooming flowers in a celebratory scene with bright primary colors and white space showing friendship and joy
illustration.alt: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes celebrating with garden friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: What did Nia find behind the special gate?
questions.explanation: Nia found a beautiful garden with flowers, butterflies, and bees behind the gate.

questions.question: Who was the first animal friend Nia met?
questions.explanation: Ruby the rabbit was the first to hop up and ask Nia to be friends.

questions.question: How did the friends help the garden?
choices: they watered flowers and planted seeds
questions.explanation: The friends worked together to water the thirsty flowers and plant new seeds.

questions.question: What makes Nia's braids special?
choices: they have colorful beads that click
questions.explanation: Nia's long braids have colorful beads that make clicking sounds when she walks.
